focus.description: Tell and write time from analog and digital clocks to the nearest five minutes, using a.m. and p.m.

ancestors.description: Tell and write time in hours and half-hours using analog and digital clocks.

learningComponents.description: Express time shown, using a.m. and p.m. when appropriate, on a digital clock using an analog clock, and vice versa
learningComponents.author: Achievement Network

learningComponents.description: Tell time from a digital clock, using a.m. and p.m. when appropriate
learningComponents.author: Achievement Network

learningComponents.description: Tell time from an analog clock, using a.m. and p.m. when appropriate
learningComponents.author: Achievement Network

learningComponents.description: Write time on a digital clock, using a.m. and p.m. when appropriate, given a description of the time
learningComponents.author: Achievement Network

learningComponents.description: Write time on an analog clock, using a.m. and p.m. when appropriate, given a description of the time
learningComponents.author: Achievement Network
